NUNC PRO TUNC TO 6/18/02 IN DEPT. 218 LORETTA M. NORRIS; FRANK HENTON, CLERK; VALERIE PAPALE, CSR. ON THE UNCONTESTED CALENDAR, ATTY. RICHARD BATES APPEARED. DEFTS. CHARLES AND MARY HENDRICS APPEARED. THE COURT AFTER HEARING THE TESTIMONY AND REVIEWING DOCUMENTS ORDERED JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF AGAINST BOTH DEFTS. FOR $3,355.08 PRINCIPAL, $1,443.27 INTEREST, $207.00 COST AND $660.00 ATTY. FEES. TOTAL DEFAULT JUDGMENT OF $5,665.35. SANCTIONS OF $250. ORDERED ON 7/17/02 IN DEPT. 212. VACATED.
